name: Shifted Color Slots
description: Allows for shifting the default 1-9 color slots in Edit Object

offset.name: Offset
offset.description:
Amount to offset the colors by.

Note how it's one less than the first color channel you'll be able to use.

Examples:
* 0 -> 1-9
* 990 -> 991-999

update-labels.name: Update Labels
update-labels.description:
If checked, updates the button labels to their actual channel number.

Otherwise, they're kept as 1-9.
